message:
test(config): add 77 unit tests for config types, validation, and daemon options

Coverage for DroppedFileQuoting::escape (11 tests), DefaultCursorStyle::effective_shape (7),
validate_domain_name/row_or_col/line_height (7), default_* helpers (12), WindowPadding,
ExitBehavior, BoldBrightening::from_dynamic, alignment enums, initial_size (3),
compute_*_dir (4), NewlineCanon, DaemonOptions path logic (8), open_log (2), set_sticky_bit (2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
